problem id: 7a79ac09
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  10000011 -> 01011101
  01001011 -> 01111111
  00000010 -> 00010001
  10110011 -> 11011101
  00100001 -> 00011001
  11111011 -> 11111111
  11100111 -> 01111111
  10100000 -> 01010101

query: 01011011
predicted answer: 11111111
